items.definition_en: The head is the top part of your body with your brain, eyes, and mouth.
items.example_en: She put her hat on her head.

items.definition_en: A hand is the part at the end of your arm that you use to hold things.
items.example_en: He washed his hands before dinner.

items.definition_en: A leg is a part of your body that you use for walking or standing.
items.example_en: She hurt her leg while running.

items.definition_en: A foot is the part at the end of your leg that you stand on.
items.example_en: His foot was cold without a sock.

items.definition_en: An arm is a part of your body that connects your hand to your shoulder.
items.example_en: She lifted the box with one arm.

items.definition_en: An eye is the part of your face you use to see.
items.example_en: He rubbed his eyes because he was tired.

items.definition_en: An ear is the part of your body you use to hear sounds.
items.example_en: She put an earring in her ear.

items.definition_en: Your mouth is the opening on your face you use to eat and speak.
items.example_en: He smiled with his mouth open.

items.definition_en: A nose is the part of your face you use to smell and breathe.
items.example_en: Her nose was cold in the winter air.

items.definition_en: Your face is the front part of your head where your eyes, nose, and mouth are.
items.example_en: He washed his face in the morning.

items.definition_en: Your back is the part of your body behind you from your neck to your waist.
items.example_en: Her back hurts after working all day.

items.definition_en: A shoulder is the part of your body where your arm joins your body.
items.example_en: He carried his bag on his shoulder.

items.definition_en: A knee is the middle part of your leg that bends.
items.example_en: She scraped her knee while playing.

items.definition_en: An elbow is the joint in the middle of your arm that bends.
items.example_en: He leaned on his elbow while reading.

items.definition_en: Your neck is the part of your body that connects your head to your shoulders.
items.example_en: She wore a necklace around her neck.

items.definition_en: Your stomach is the front part of your body between your chest and legs.
items.example_en: His stomach hurt after eating too much.

items.definition_en: A toe is one of the small parts at the end of your foot.
items.example_en: She painted her big toe red.

items.definition_en: A finger is one of the small parts on your hand.
items.example_en: He wore a ring on his finger.

items.definition_en: Hair is the stuff that grows on your head and other parts of your body.
items.example_en: She brushes her hair every morning.

items.definition_en: Skin is the layer that covers and protects your body.
items.example_en: He has soft skin on his hands.
